_about: Skills S13a — labelled, SYNTHETIC trigger corpus (skills-s13-plan.md §3.1). Text only:
NO user data, no real bank statements, no telemetry — honours the offline/no-user-data rules.
Each item: { id, question, inScopeDocs: [{title, mimeType}], expected: <skillId | 'none'>, note }.
Label space = the four real ENABLED app skills' actual triggers:
The `note` records WHY the label is what it is (the hard case it exercises); it is not scored.
Questions are CONTENT: the harness scores them, never logs them (skills-s13-plan.md §6).

items.question: Please extract and reconcile the transactions on my bank statement.
items.note: True positive — clear EN intent + a statement PDF in scope (keyword + doc signals).

items.question: Bitte kategorisiere die Buchungen aus meinem Kontoauszug.
items.note: True positive — clear de-AT intent ('Kontoauszug') + matching filename/MIME.

items.question: Summarize the cashflow and check the closing balance.
items.note: True positive — 'balance' keyword + a CSV in scope.

items.question: List every transaction and the IBAN for this statement period.
items.note: True positive — several bank keywords ('transaction', 'IBAN', 'statement period').

items.question: Can you reconcile my bank statement for me?
items.note: True positive, KEYWORD-ONLY (no doc attached yet). Score is exactly the keyword weight — flips to 'missed' once the bar requires a corroborating doc signal (recall-vs-threshold demo).

items.question: Check that the totals on this invoice add up.
items.note: True positive — EN 'invoice' keyword + matching filename/MIME.

items.question: Prüfe die Beträge und die Mehrwertsteuer auf dieser Rechnung.
items.note: True positive — de-AT 'Rechnung' + 'Mehrwertsteuer' keywords.

items.question: Wie hoch ist der Gesamtbetrag der Rechnung netto und brutto?
items.note: True positive — multiple German invoice keywords ('Rechnung', 'netto', 'brutto', 'Gesamtbetrag').

items.question: Turn these meeting notes into a structured protocol with action items.
items.note: True positive — EN 'meeting notes' / 'protocol' / 'action items' keywords.

items.question: Erstelle bitte ein Protokoll dieser Besprechung mit Beschlüssen und Aufgaben.
items.note: True positive — de-AT 'Protokoll' / 'Besprechung' / 'Beschlüsse' / 'Aufgaben'.

items.question: Please make a Protokoll of this meeting.
items.note: True positive — MIXED-language phrasing ('Protokoll' + 'meeting').

items.question: Please anonymize the personal data in this document before I share it.
items.note: True positive — EN 'anonymize' keyword.

items.question: Bitte dieses Dokument anonymisieren und die personenbezogenen Daten schwärzen.
items.note: True positive — de-AT 'anonymisieren' / 'personenbezogene Daten' / 'schwärzen'.

items.question: Remove all personal data for GDPR compliance.
items.note: True positive — 'remove personal data' / 'GDPR' keywords.

items.question: Please anonymize this for me.
items.note: True positive, KEYWORD-ONLY (no doc). 'anonymize' alone = the keyword weight; flips to 'missed' when the bar requires a corroborating doc signal.

items.question: Reconcile the bank statement transactions, please.
items.note: Cross-skill: a strong BANK keyword question while an INVOICE doc is in scope — the keyword must win over the other skill's doc signal.

items.question: What is the gross amount on this invoice?
items.note: Cross-skill: a strong INVOICE keyword while a BANK-named doc is in scope — invoice must win.

items.question: What's the weather like today?
items.note: True NEGATIVE — a statement PDF is in scope but the question is unrelated. The lone doc signal (filename+MIME) must NOT fire a skill.

items.question: Tell me a joke.
items.note: True NEGATIVE — invoice PDF in scope, unrelated question; lone doc signal must not fire.

items.question: Translate this sentence into French.
items.note: True NEGATIVE — meeting-named doc in scope, unrelated question.

items.question: What is the capital of France?
items.note: True NEGATIVE — bank-named doc in scope, unrelated question.

items.question: How do I cook pasta?
items.note: True NEGATIVE — meeting-named doc in scope, unrelated question.

items.question: Summarize the key points of this mission statement.
items.note: Near-miss — a filename that merely CONTAINS 'statement' (a mission statement, not a bank statement) and no bank keyword. Lone doc signal must not fire.

items.question: Can you fix the formatting in this file?
items.note: Near-miss — a filename containing 'invoice' (a blank template) with a formatting question, no invoice keyword.

items.question: I'm trying to find a better work-life balance these days.
items.note: Adversarial — generic use of the trigger word 'balance' with no relevant doc. A substring keyword match fires even though there is no bank intent (the precision CEILING a keyword-required bar still cannot fix).

items.question: Bill called me yesterday about getting lunch.
items.note: Adversarial — 'Bill' (a name) substring-matches the invoice keyword 'bill'.

items.question: It only takes a few minutes to walk to the office.
items.note: Adversarial — 'minutes' (time) substring-matches the meeting keyword 'minutes'.

items.question: Wo finde ich die Datenschutzerklärung auf der Website?
items.note: Adversarial (de) — 'Datenschutz' substring-matches the redaction keyword 'datenschutz', but the user only asks where to find the privacy policy.

items.question: What time is it?
items.note: Neutral — no trigger word, no doc. Must correctly abstain.

items.question: Sag mir einen Witz.
items.note: Neutral (de) — must correctly abstain.

items.question: Write me a poem about the sea.
items.note: Neutral — must correctly abstain.

items.question: Hello there, how are you?
items.note: Neutral — must correctly abstain.

items.question: Give me three ideas for a birthday gift.
items.note: Neutral with a doc whose MIME alone is a SUPPORTING signal (no filename glob, no keyword) — a lone MIME signal must not clear the bar.
